title: Enforce authz in handle_event (simple ownership)
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/comment_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.CommentLive). Its handle_event("delete", %{"id" => id}, socket) must look up the comment via MyApp.Forum.get_comment!/1 and compare comment.author_id to socket.assigns.current_user.id. On match, delete and remove; on mismatch, put_flash :error and return. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, current_user: %{id: 1}, comments: [])}.
tier_rationale: Canonical ownership check. Single comparison + branch.
